title: Chapter 532
content:
NovᴇlFire admin to *.org admin: "Oh, so it’s fine for you to take data from my site, but when I take yours, suddenly it’s a problem? How generous of you.".

ɴᴇᴡ ɴᴏᴠᴇʟ ᴄʜᴀᴘᴛᴇʀs ᴀʀᴇ ᴘᴜʙʟɪsʜᴇᴅ ᴏɴ NovᴇlFirᴇ
